message:
test(proptest): expand ars_secret_scan coverage from 14 to 38 property tests

Adds 24 new tests covering: entropy determinism/permutation-invariance,
ScanVerdict contaminated serde (f64 tolerance), ScanFinding/ScanContamination
serde roundtrips, DetectionMethod serde, ScanStats serde/method tracking/
monotonic increments, ArsScanConfig defaults/extra_patterns, injected
known-prefix detection, scan_output toggle, multi-finding count invariants,
empty commands, large sequences, and with_defaults() smoke test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
